scope: repository function-layer canonicalization for fixed-budget next-step branch allocation

functions.name: fixed_budget_final_utility_objective
functions.role: Top-level optimization target: final utility/decision quality under fixed budget.
functions.description: Repository-wide objective framing that governs admissible experiments and evaluation interpretation.

functions.name: estimated_value_if_allocate_next
functions.role: One-step continuation-value primitive for branch expansion.
functions.description: Core primitive used directly and as anchor for multistep and hybrid targets.

functions.name: multistep_branch_utility_target_k3
functions.description: Current strongest bounded expansion target family in repo summaries.

functions.name: branch_completion_score
functions.role: Visible completion-quality proxy for incumbent/commit quality.
functions.description: Bounded local signal; not a global replacement for continuation-value objective.

functions.name: branch_answer_evidence_score
functions.role: Answer-evidence proxy for commit readiness and semantic adjudication.
functions.description: Used in completion-aware and hybrid local corrections.

functions.name: hybrid_oracle_score
functions.role: Local disagreement-slice composition of continuation, completion, answer evidence, and outside-gap normalization.
functions.description: Useful bounded policy component; not yet repository-wide frozen global objective.

functions.name: completion_bonus_policy
functions.role: Adds bounded completion bonus to continuation score.
functions.description: Policy variant for local disagreement handling.

functions.name: completion_outside_gate_policy
functions.role: Completion-aware override with outside-gap/value-drop safety checks.
functions.description: Bounded gate policy for disagreement states.

functions.name: completion_tie_resolution_policy
functions.role: Near-tie resolution using completion score among near-top contenders.

functions.name: discounted_multistep_branch_utility_target_gammaXX
functions.description: Evaluated and retained as diagnostic branch; not current default.

functions.name: compute_response_curve_target_h123
functions.role: Short-horizon response-curve target and scalarized decision score.
functions.description: Richer target object that did not displace multistep-k3 in bounded passes.

functions.name: rank_instability_target_v1
functions.description: Useful uncertainty signal but not canonical expansion objective.

functions.name: penalized_marginal_defer_target
functions.role: Ternary left/right/defer supervision with budget-price penalty.
functions.description: Important defer diagnostic family; not default global target.

functions.name: opportunity_intensity_weighted
functions.role: Pair reweighting by opportunity intensity (with/without outside normalization).

functions.name: allocation_regret_target
functions.role: Target based on regret relative to best available branch (optionally including outside option).
functions.description: Alternative shaping target retained for provenance and diagnostics.

functions.name: ambiguous_tie_target / soft_prob_tie
functions.role: Near-tie ambiguity labeling and soft ternary target probability.
functions.description: Tie-aware supervision utilities for hard-slice handling.

functions.name: rank_instability_aware_decision_rules
functions.description: Local gating family; improves diagnosis and selective abstention analysis.

functions.name: instability_decision_coupling_policy_family
functions.role: Policy-level coupling between rank instability and expand/defer decision thresholds.
functions.description: Explicit bounded policy family; not canonical default controller.

functions.name: pairwise_default_plus_fallback_summary
functions.role: Older summary emphasizing pairwise default + fallback scaffold.
functions.description: Demoted from repository-wide canonical framing in favor of objective/expansion/incumbent/decision decomposition.
